items.title: Python function bundles now include precompiled bytecode
items.content_text: Vercel now compiles Python functions to bytecode at build time. In our benchmarks, cold starts for the median-sized function dropped from 2.8s to 1.3s.When Python imports a module without cached bytecode, it parses and compiles the source before executing it. That compilation step adds startup time for functions with large dependency trees. Vercel now compiles both application code and dependencies and includes the resulting .pyc files in the function bundle, so the interpreter skips compilation

Relay.app is shutting down: How to export your workflows and move to Zapier
items.content_text: Relay is shutting down on August 15, 2026, for free users, and on September 14 for paid plans. Either way, if you built workflows, agents, or tables in Relay, the end is near. items.title: Nearness
items.content_text:
We come to the shore carrying our distances.

Here, bodies move closer, drift apart, touch, wait, and watch. Small gestures become visible. A hand resting on a shoulder. Two figures facing the same horizon. The quiet space between people who know each other, and those who do not.

Perhaps the sea does not bring us together.

Perhaps it simply reveals what already exists between us.

items.title: 2026-06-30: SCIM provisioning: HCP now supports SCIM (System for Cross-domain Identity Management) provisioning…
items.content_html:
SCIM provisioning: HCP now supports SCIM (System for Cross-domain Identity Management) provisioning for automated user and group lifecycle management. With SCIM enabled, you can automatically sync user and group changes from your identity provider to HCP, including:

  • User creation, modification, and deletion
  • Group creation, modification, and deletion
  • Group membership updates

SCIM provisioning is available for organizations with SAML SSO configured. Supported identity providers include Microsoft Entra ID, Okta, Ping ID, and IBM Verify.

For more information, refer to SCIM provisioning.
